introSection: Pirates Island Typhoon (Japanese: 海賊島タイフーン) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Shibamasa World in Sakai, Fukui, Japan.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: It is part of the Mini Coaster product line by Meisho Amusement Machines and feautures the Adventure Coaster layout.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains are designed to resemble mine carts.

fullText:
Pirates Island Typhoon (Japanese: 海賊島タイフーン) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Shibamasa World in Sakai, Fukui, Japan.

It is part of the Mini Coaster product line by Meisho Amusement Machines and feautures the Adventure Coaster layout.

Black track and supports.

The trains are designed to resemble mine carts.
